Bus Timings

Explore Bus 7 Schedule Al Quoz Bus Station to Satwa Masjid and Return

May 20, 2025
By Al Khaleej
Install
★★★★★ 5.0
Google Play Official App
UAE Bus Timing

Travel across the UAE with confidence. No confusion. No wasted time.

Bus 7 provides comprehensive coverage between Al Quoz and Satwa, connecting several key locations and neighborhoods across Dubai. This route is designed to offer convenient access to major commercial and residential areas, making it a crucial part of the city’s public transport network. The bus operates frequently throughout the day, ensuring passengers have access to reliable transportation options.

Route Name 7
Route Description Al Quoz Bus Station · 1 - Satwa, Masjid - Al Quoz Bus Station · 1
Total Distance Approximately 28-30 kilometers
Total Journey Time Approximately 1 hour 11 minutes
Operational Hours 05:30 to 23:57 (Depending on Starting Point)
Fare AED 3
Official Website RTA Dubai

Download PDF Bus 7

Bus 7 Route in Dubai

Bus Timings

Bus 7 operates throughout the day with frequent departures from both ends of the route. Here are the key timings:

Bus 7 Timetable

To view the full schedule, you can visit the official RTA website or follow this link to access the Bus 7 Timings.

Bus Ticket Price

The fare for Bus 7 is based on the number of zones traveled, with a standard rate of AED 3 for a single zone. This pricing makes it a cost-effective choice for daily commuters while ensuring a comfortable and reliable journey throughout Dubai. For trips that span multiple zones, fares will vary according to the number of zones crossed.

Bus Booking

Currently, Bus 7 does not offer online booking options. Tickets can be purchased directly from the bus or at designated bus stations. For up-to-date information on bus schedules and routes, passengers can use the RTA Dubai app, which provides real-time updates and route details for convenient planning. The app also offers features for checking bus arrival times and service notifications.

Bus 7 Station Overview

Al Quoz Bus Station · 1

The Al Quoz Bus Station is a central transit point serving the Al Quoz industrial and residential areas. It is strategically located to provide easy access to various commercial and business zones within Al Quoz. The station features modern amenities such as sheltered waiting areas and real-time bus schedule updates, ensuring a comfortable and efficient travel experience. Its position makes it a vital link for both local commuters and those traveling to the broader Dubai region.

Business Bay Metro Station Seaside Bus Stop Intersection

Business Bay Metro Station Seaside Bus Stop is a crucial intersection where Bus Routes 7, 9, 14, 91, and F20 converge. This stop serves as a vital connection point for passengers traveling within the Business Bay area and to various destinations across Dubai. Its strategic location near major business and residential areas makes it a convenient choice for daily commuters and travelers seeking easy access to key parts of the city.

Satwa, Masjid

This station is conveniently located near a prominent mosque, serving the local community and visitors. It provides essential transportation links within the Satwa area and to other parts of Dubai.

Tourist Destination Along the Way

Bus 7 passes several notable destinations and attractions in Dubai: 1.

  1. Jumeira American School: Located in a vibrant neighborhood with proximity to other attractions.

  2. Iranian Hospital: While primarily a healthcare facility, its location is central and accessible for visitors.

4.

  1. Business Bay: A bustling commercial district with modern architecture and waterfront views.

These stops offer a mix of shopping, dining, and cultural experiences, making Bus 7 a convenient route for exploring various facets of Dubai.

Journey Experience

The 7 bus route from Al Quoz Bus Station to Satwa Masjid and back offers a long but fascinating journey through Dubai, blending industrial, commercial, and community life.

As the bus nears Satwa, the bustling streets become more vibrant with small shops, local eateries, and lively markets, reflecting the neighborhood’s cultural diversity. Satwa Masjid, located in this culturally rich area, serves as the endpoint before the return trip. Despite its length, the route provides a unique perspective on Dubai’s urban and community dynamics, making it a rewarding experience for those interested in exploring the city’s diverse character.

Travelling with Careem

Using the Careem app, you can conveniently travel to Satwa, Masjid, the furthest point on the Bus 7 route, starting from Al Quoz Bus Station · 1. The estimated fare for this journey ranges between AED 43 and AED 52, providing a reliable and comfortable travel option. The app allows you to easily book your ride and access real-time fare estimates, ensuring a smooth and hassle-free experience from start to finish.

Bus 7 provides a crucial connection across Dubai, linking Al Quoz and Satwa with frequent, affordable service. It operates throughout the day, catering to various travel needs. Although online booking isn’t available, tickets can be purchased directly on the bus or at stations. For real-time updates, the RTA Dubai app is a useful tool. Overall, Bus 7 offers a convenient option for navigating Dubai’s neighborhoods.

Official UAE Sources

For the latest schedules, fares, and policy updates, verify with these primary sources:

  • RTA Journey Planner
  • RTA Intercity Timetable Reference (E100)
  • Abu Dhabi Mobility
  • Sharjah Roads and Transport Authority (SRTA)

Editorial review date: May 20, 2025.

Written by Al Khaleej
